title: Okay, this unleashed my agent
summary: AI Jason reviews multiple autonomous agent frameworks and mechanisms for building AI agents, comparing approaches like autoresearch, self-evolution, and memory architectures. The video covers Claude Code, Hermes, and OpenClaw as implementations.
